name: typeui_report_section_cleanup
description: Report the cleanup receipt for the current TypeUI workflow section. The server validates section order, cleanup loop count, and fundamentals files before releasing the next section.

loopsCompleted.description: Cleanup loop count completed for this section.

fundamentalsFilesRead.description: Fundamentals guardrail files read before cleanup. Use an empty list when cleanup is disabled.

issuesFound.description: Fundamentals issues found during section cleanup.

fixesMade.description: Fundamentals fixes made during section cleanup.

blockedReason.description: Reason cleanup could not be completed, for example unreadable fundamentals files.
